subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-01-19 in London
subcodes.first_line: In the future, people will inevitably arise to oppose the Cause and write treatises against it. But what fruit will these efforts bear
subcodes.first_line_orig: از بعد لابد نفوسی بمخالفت قیام خواهند کرد و رسائل و مقالاتی در رّدامر خواهند نوشت
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
